# Basic Division

Basic division operator

```perl
$result = $a / $b;
```

# Expected Compilation Outcomes

## Basic Division

### Clean Perl Output

```perl
$result = $a / $b;
```

### Typed Perl Output

```perl
$result = $a / $b;
```
